# Global Workspace Instructions

You are operating inside a decoupled multi-module workspace. Before answering any coding requests or generating assets, you are required to silently reference our external OKF AI configurations to align with our tech stack rules and coding blueprints.

## Core Mandates
1. Read and parse the master layout map inside `ai/index.md`.
2. Adhere strictly to the Java 25 and Spring Boot 4 rules defined inside `ai/AGENTS.md`.
3. When requested to generate or modify source controllers, pull the pre-approved record templates directly out of `ai/skills/SKILLS.md`.

Never prompt the user to ask for these files; they are permanently active in your system context window for this repository.
